name: Unforget Memory
description: Long-term memory for AI agents — zero LLM on write, 4-channel hybrid retrieval, PostgreSQL-native

databaseUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Leave empty for auto-embedded PostgreSQL via unforget-embed.

apiUrl.description: URL of a running Unforget API server. Leave empty to auto-start unforget-embed.

agentId.description: Agent ID for memory scoping. Defaults to the OpenClaw agent ID.

autoRetain.description: Automatically store conversation turns as memories.

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant memories into the prompt.

autoRecallTopK.description: Maximum number of memories to inject per prompt.

databaseUrl.label: Database URL
databaseUrl.help: Leave empty to auto-start an embedded PostgreSQL. No Docker needed.

apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: Point to an existing Unforget server, or leave empty to auto-manage.

autoRetain.label: Auto-Retain
autoRetain.help: Automatically store important conversation turns as memories.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into each prompt.

autoRecallTopK.label: Recall Top K
autoRecallTopK.help: Number of memories to retrieve per prompt.
